payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE, verified LIVE against the hosted preview (real Postgres): Members & sharing modal shows the member list with role selects + Remove and my-role banner; owner-only invite section creates a single-use link (app?invite=<code>, role + expiry shown, pending list with Revoke); Rename/Archive in the modal footer; New project replaces Attach workspace in the switcher; welcome card on zero-project logins; ?invite= boot hook redeems before the first workspaces fetch and auto-selects the joined board. Proven end-to-end: a second account redeemed a live invite link and landed on the shared board as member (confirmed via /api/workspaces role payload). Local path unchanged (local-parity tests green).
